CustomField.description: Number of active Contracts on the account. TODO: convert to a roll-up summary on Contract.IsActive once Account-Contract is master-detail (currently a standard lookup, which platform does not allow rollups on). For now this is maintained by the Contract trigger.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Count of currently active contracts. Maintained by the Contract trigger; do not edit manually.
CustomField.label: Active Contract Count
